description_long: This is a classic, retro-style van with a vibrant, psychedelic paint job featuring colorful flowers, peace signs, and the words 'LOVE' and 'FLOWER POWER' on its sides. The van has a boxy shape with rounded edges, a white roof, and multiple large windows along both sides. The front is characterized by a split windshield, round headlights, and a prominent V-shaped design on the hood. The wheels are black with simple hubcaps, and the bumpers are robust and dark-colored. The rear of the van is flat with additional floral patterns and a rectangular rear window. The overall design is reminiscent of the iconic vans popularized during the 1960s and 1970s counterculture movement.
description: A retro van with a colorful, flower-themed paint job, large windows, and a white roof, evoking a 1960s-70s hippie style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the split windshield, round headlights, and a V-shaped floral design on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'LOVE' text, peace signs, and multiple windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat back with a rectangular window and more floral patterns.
description_view_3: Right side view features the 'FLOWER POWER' text, peace symbols, and a row of windows.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
